posts.author: CoffeeEngineer
posts.community: Greaves Cotton - Is this up to investors?
posts.text: I was bored and saw this link https://www.ankmitra.com/vahan-2w-ev-daily-sales-data kudos to @hardik_shah1 in Ola Electric post. Saw some interesting growth in Greaves so decided to run some numbers. Greaves 2W EV Sales should be around 25k units for Q2(extrapolated June data from run rate till now). That’s up 38% QoQ and 97% YoY Then I noticed EV sales in general have increased since March(coinciding with the war in Iran). Maybe because of petrol price increase? but that can’t be it because prices were increased on 15th May. One factor that can be the reason is shortage of petrol(i don’t know…
